name: Werewolf Arcade
description:
World of Darkness au. (That’s what the dead dove tag is for.)

Current WIP. I’ll see if I can get the bot to not think the Baali are the main threat of the game line lol. Mainly based on W5 but that may change. Intro assumes you are not garou/fera/arguably fomori but idk you could go through your first change right in front of him.
